name: Misfiled Prophecy
text: A prophecy about a chosen one has been filed under the wrong kingdom. The universe waits impatiently for a correction stamp.

choices.result_text: The prophecy updates itself with a sigh of cosmic resentment.
The prophecy is returned to sender. Somewhere, destiny loses a tracking number.

name: Haunted Suggestion Box
text: A suggestion box rattles on the wall. The complaints inside appear to be written by people who have been dead for centuries.

choices.result_text: The dead are very specific, very angry, and surprisingly helpful.

choices.text: Seal the box with official tape.
choices.result_text: The box continues rattling, but now in a more compliant manner.

name: Unionized Broom Closet
text: Several brooms have organized a union meeting inside a closet. Their demands include better bristles and fewer heroic montages.

choices.result_text: The brooms respect your paperwork and improve one of your procedures.
Nothing is solved, but everyone feels represented.

name: Lost-and-Found Desk
text: Behind a dusty desk lies a pile of forgotten equipment, misplaced forms, and one suspiciously warm stapler.

choices.result_text: You find something that might become useful after several layers of approval.
Your deck feels slightly less cluttered, at least in spirit.
